recentArticles.title: Zayn Reveals Daughter Inspired Collab With Jisoo: ‘I Got Some Good Dad Points for That’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: In a new interview with SiriusXM, the former boy band member shares that his daughter is a big K-pop fan and that he asks her opinion on his new music. In a Tuesday (March 31) interview with SiriusXM’s The Pulse, the former One Direction member spoke about upcoming album, *Konnakol*, and sharing his music with his five-year-old daughter, Khai, to get her opinion on his work. “She loves my music and she definitely gives me an opinion,” Zayn replied. “She gave me a double thumbs up for a few songs and there was like a side one for one or two, I think, that she wasn’t really into,” said Zayn. How Khai really directed Zayn’s musical path, though, is with her love of K-pop. Last year, Zayn and Jisoo partnered up for the Billboard Hot 100 hit single “Eyes Closed,” dropped just months after Zayn brought Khai to see BLACKPINK live. “I got some good dad points for that,” he said before sharing that he’s always thinking of his daughter when making new music.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要關於Zayn與Jisoo的合作以及他女兒對K-pop的喜愛，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Megan Thee Stallion taken to hospital during Moulin Rouge performance - BBC
recentArticles.snippet: # Megan Thee Stallion taken to hospital during Moulin Rouge performance. Rapper Megan Thee Stallion had to be taken to hospital mid-way through her performance of Moulin Rouge! The musician, 31, is performing as Zidler – the show's eccentric master of ceremonies – marking her highly anticipated Broadway debut. Megan Thee Stallion, whose real name is Megan Pete, is scheduled to play Zidler until 17 May, the Moulin Rouge website says. Megan Thee Stallion is best-known for hits including Savage, WAP and Body. In 2021, she won three Grammy awards for Best Rap Song, Best New Artist and Best Rap Performance. Harold Zidler was first played by Danny Burstein in the original Broadway cast of Moulin Rouge, and won a coveted Tony award in 2020 for it. More recently, celebrity drag artist Bob the Drag Queen played Zidler in the musical for eight weeks earlier this year. The BBC has contacted Megan Thee Stallion's team for comment.

recentArticles.title: As GLP-1 Adoption Surges, Jay Campbell’s Metabolic Awakening with GLP-1 Peptides Rewrites the Conversation on Metabolic Health - Digital Journal
recentArticles.snippet: # As GLP-1 Adoption Surges, Jay Campbell’s Metabolic Awakening with GLP-1 Peptides Rewrites the Conversation on Metabolic Health. Five-time international bestselling author Jay Campbell steps into this inflection point with the release of his newest book *Metabolic Awakening with GLP-1 Peptides*, a strategically grounded examination of how GLP-1 based therapies can be implemented with precision rather than recklessness. In *Metabolic Awakening with GLP-1 Peptides*, Jay outlines a measured GLP-1 microdosing framework designed to protect endocrine balance, preserve muscle mass for optimal body composition, and minimize rebound of dysregulated appetite signaling. Jay explores the broader hormonal cascade outside of GLP-1, including GIP and glucagon signaling, and translates complex biochemical networks into actionable strategies intended for long-term metabolic resilience. Jay’s newest book positions itself not as a countertrend, but as a recalibration—inviting readers to pursue a state of metabolic optimization that compounds long after the headlines fade. Jay Campbell is a five-time international bestselling author and health optimization expert with more than 20 years of professional experience in hormone and metabolic health.

recentArticles.title: Foley Entertainment Group Names Jay Heidenreich Vice President of Sales and Giovanni Salvino-Prada Vice President of Marketing - Hotel News Resource
recentArticles.snippet: # Foley Entertainment Group Names Jay Heidenreich Vice President of Sales and Giovanni Salvino-Prada Vice President of Marketing. **In Brief:** Foley Entertainment Group has announced new appointments, with Jay Heidenreich taking on the role of Vice President of Sales and Giovanni Salvino-Prada stepping into the Vice President of Marketing position. * Giovanni Salvino-Prada and Jay Heidenreich - Image Credit Foley Entertainment Group. Foley Entertainment Group has appointed Jay Heidenreich as Vice President of Sales and Giovanni Salvino-Prada as Vice President of Marketing. In these roles, Heidenreich and Salvino-Prada will oversee global sales and marketing strategy for the company’s portfolio, which includes wine country resort destinations, weddings and events at Foley Family Wine Vineyards, and The Foley Collection of private homes in or near wine country. Heidenreich and Salvino-Prada will oversee commercial strategy for Foley Entertainment Group’s properties, including MacArthur Place Hotel & Spa, Farmhouse Inn, 27 North Healdsburg, Black Walnut Inn & Vineyard, Grange Estate, Hotel Californian, and Wharekauhau Country Estate.

recentArticles.title: Jeff Satur on 'Happy Ending,' 'Red Giant' and Going Global - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: “My dream from the start is just to play music, just to sing, just to perform,” Satur tells *Variety*. After roughly a decade in the Thai music industry without a breakthrough, he turned to acting, landing an OST for the BL drama “KinnPorsche the Series.” The song’s success gave his music career the traction it had long lacked. “I believe that a good team will give me a good career,” he says. That ethos is most visible in “Happy Ending,” a series on which Satur serves simultaneously as producer, scriptwriter, composer and lead actor. “The way I approach producing is like a song – you go into every little detail,” he says. So I have to do both.”. “Just release the song that nobody could find anywhere else, and try to be out of the comfort zone – a new version of Jeff Satur every year.”. “I want to go to as many countries as possible – to see them face to face in their own country.”.

recentArticles.title: 'BTS: The Return' Director Bao Nguyen on Capturing an Intimate Look at the Band - variety.com
recentArticles.snippet: All seven members return to the studio to record and mix their latest album, “Arirang.” When director Bao Nguyen set out to film the documentary and tell the story of the biggest band in the world, he knew he wouldn’t have access to the band 24/7. Speaking at the Los Angeles screening of the documentary, Nguyen said, “I had this idea of, what if we gave them their own camcorders?” He added, “They shoot their own content on their phone, but that’s a very specific visual language.” He added, “I wanted to evoke something like your brother, mother, or uncle were filming a vacation. R.J Cutler explained the 92-minute documentary really gets to the “guts of what it means to be BTS and how that relates to what it means to be each of them individually.” He added, “That’s a very rare thing to see with a legendary band.

recentArticles.title: R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Victory, Jessie Reyez, Fetty Wap, Noah Guy & More - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Victory, Jessie Reyez, Fetty Wap, Noah Guy & More. Listen to new must-hear songs from R&B/hip-hop artists like Anella and 89 the Brainchild. With Fresh Picks, *Billboard* aims to highlight some of the best and most interesting new sounds across R&B and hip-hop — from a ’00s-nodding party jam from Anella to a soulful new Jessie Reyez track. *Confessions of a Lonely Girl* — an intimate, 17-track affair that seamlessly blends folk and soul music — arrived on Friday (March 27), and “What If Love Was Free?” is an immediate standout. Housed on his new *Ask Me How I’ve Been* project, “Thinkin Bout Us” finds the 23-year-old interpolating the chorus melody of T-Pain’s classic “I’m N Luv (Wit a Stripper),” across a mixture of finger-picked guitars and a skeletal drum pattern.

recentArticles.title: Dialled In Launches Record Label With Island-EMI's The Collective - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Dialled In Launches Record Label in Partnership With Island-EMI’s The Collective, Signs Excise Dept and Ahadadream (EXCLUSIVE). South Asian culture platform Dialled In has unveiled Dialled In Records, a London-based label dedicated to developing and breaking South Asian artists across genres. The label has launched in partnership with The Collective, the A&R entrepreneur imprint within Island-EMI at Universal Music Group U.K. The label’s inaugural signings are Ahadadream — one of Dialled In’s own co-founders — and New Delhi and Mumbai-based multidisciplinary collective Excise Dept. Founded by a collective of South Asian entrepreneurs, curators and music professionals, Dialled In has built a presence across South Asian arts and culture in the U.K. over the past five years, with programming reaching institutions such as Glastonbury, the Barbican and the V&A as well as grassroots venues. * ### Jacob Elordi, Margot Robbie’s ‘Wuthering Heights’ Tops U.K., Ireland Box Office.

recentArticles.title: Jaden Ivey calls Bulls ‘liars’ over framing of his release after anti-religion, LGBTQ rants - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Jaden Ivey calls Bulls ‘liars’ over framing of his release after anti-religion, LGBTQ rants. Jaden Ivey called the Bulls “liars” after the team waived him on Monday for “conduct detrimental to the team” following an Instagram livestream where he criticized the NBA’s support of Pride Month. Ivey has hosted several livestreams recently where he has gone on lengthy tangents about religion and has made inflammatory remarks, including calling Catholicism a “false religion.”. This is lying,” Ivey said during the Instagram Live, which appeared to be taking place while he was boarding a flight. Ivey also questioned why the Bulls didn’t outright say that the organization did not agree with his stance on LGBTQ issues, while continuing to insist that he had been a good teammate. “He don’t know Jesus and I pray he comes to the truth,” Ivey said. Asked about the decision to waive Ivey, Bulls head coach Bill Donovan said that “there’s a certain level of standards and expectations that are here.”.

recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Grey’s Anatomy’ Renewed for Season 23 on ABC. “Grey’s Anatomy” has been renewed for its 23rd season on ABC. In 2025, it was the No. 1 most-streamed series across Disney+ and Hulu, and Nielsen recorded it as the No. 2 most-streamed series in the U.S. across all platforms. “Grey’s Anatomy” stars Ellen Pompeo as Meredith Grey; Meredith was the show’s central character until Pompeo took a step back during Season 19, though she continues her work as show’s narrator, makes on-screen guest appearances and serves as an executive producer. The Season 23 renewal makes “Grey’s Anatomy” part of a 2026-2027 lineup for ABC that includes Season 10 of “9-1-1,” Season 2 of “9-1-1: Nashville,” Season 6 of “Abbott Elementary” and Season 3 of “High Potential.”. ## Love Film & TV? recentArticles.title: Apple's M5 Pro/M5 Max MacBook Pro Reaches New All-Time Low Prices on Amazon - MacRumors
recentArticles.snippet: # Apple's M5 Pro/M5 Max MacBook Pro Reaches New All-Time Low Prices on Amazon. Amazon is offering new all-time low prices on Apple's M5 Pro/M5 Max MacBook Pro, with up to $149 off select models without the need of a membership or clipping a coupon. This deal, along with all of the others we're tracking in this article, represent new best-ever prices on the brand new M5 Pro and M5 Max MacBook Pro. 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro (24GB/1TB) for $2,049.99. ### Apple to Launch These 15+ New Products Later This Year. ### Apple Releasing Two New iPhone Apps This Year. Apple is expected to release two new iPhone apps this year, including an Apple Business app and a Siri app with chatbot-like functionality. iPhone 17 vs iPhone 17 Pro vs iPhone Air. Apple's four new iPhones feature more differences between the latest models than ever before, so which one should you buy?

今日所提供的娛樂新聞中，並未包含任何與周杰倫直接相關的報導或動態。所有焦點均集中在其他國際藝人的最新專輯發行、演唱會消息、影視作品續訂、體育賽事結果以及科技產品更新等多元領域。
今日新聞摘要中，經仔細審閱所有提供的報導，並未發現任何與華語流行天王周杰倫相關的最新動態或新聞事件。所有提及『Jay-Z』的報導均為不同藝人的資訊，因此今日無周杰倫的焦點事件可供整理與發布。
周杰倫近日話題豐富，睽違四年將推新專輯，預告收錄求婚影片，並鬆口巡演最終站可能回台灣。他揭露當年向昆凌求婚的「假古堡」內幕，新歌MV斥資上億引發熱議。此外，他曾設計連川普都擁有的手錶，早期寫歌「罵方文山」也成經典。
周杰倫今日焦點圍繞新專輯《太陽之子》發行。主打歌MV斥資上億由《阿凡達》團隊打造，專輯中更收錄為小女兒Jacinda創作的《女兒殿下》，並預告將曝光他向昆凌求婚的浪漫影片。他還透露了求婚時的核彈級內幕，以及曾兩度恐慌症發作的經歷。此外，周董也鬆口未來巡演最終站可能回到台灣。
key_events: 透露求婚內幕與恐慌症

recentReports.daily_summary: 周杰倫睽違四年推出新專輯《太陽之子》，首波主打MV斥資上億元，由《阿凡達》團隊打造，並藏有30幅名畫彩蛋。專輯中為小女兒創作〈女兒殿下〉，更預告將公開與昆凌的求婚影片。他還分享曾兩度恐慌症發作，並透露巡演最終站可能回台灣。
今日共搜集 50 篇周杰倫相關新聞。
